notes:
Video and audio appear to work and game appears to be playable.

Could not play with controller (tried multiple Bluetooth connected controllers including Xbox One S and tried XBox One S and XBox One controller using wired connection).  It appears that some input is constantly being triggered and directional control is not usable with a controller connected.  This makes the game unplayable with a controller connected.

Disconnecting controller allows keyboard controls to be used normally.
title: Romancing SaGa 2
